plugins.name: recomby-geo
plugins.description: GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) workflow for Codex CLI. 7-stage pipeline (intake → audit → gap → content-brief → production → distribution → reaudit) driven by the geo-pipeline skill; 7 vendored capability skills + the geo-review-html client-review renderer; JSON-schema-checked artifacts; per-client folder convention. Mirrors the Claude Code plugin in this repo (./plugins/recomby-geo).
